description: Tensors and dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/torch && python3 torch.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`.
